_label_note: EU Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered public support-hotline bait, obfuscated VAT/tax/passport phone-shaped fragments, dotted-date and filing-reference phone bait, role/placeholder emails, template passport values, EU registry/ISIN/LEI/tax numeric fragments, log-id amount fragments, placeholder country-code phones, and negated MAE/contingent-MNPI language. Full EU member-state national-ID breadth and broader semantic GDPR special-category coverage remain ideal-tier gaps.
_label_tier_note: EU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

_stage_readiness.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed all jurisdiction generated Stage A tests and approved the sets as ready for Stage B corpus expansion. This is internal/project benchmark readiness, not recall-lock promotion, legal advice, or procurement-grade legal review.

must_detect.matched_text:
Aurora Carbon SE is admitted to trading on the EuroNorth Growth Segment (ENGS) operated by the Baltic Alpine Exchange; competent authority: Oridonia Capital Markets Authority (OCMA).
Oridonia Companies Register No. OCR-2023-004512.
MAR status: sustainability-linked PPA discussions referenced here are already disclosed via issuer information bulletin dated 2025-10-15; no new precise non-public information is included.
Insider list maintenance performed by the Secretariat; submissions to insiderlist@auroracarbon.eu; role-only titles are to be used (no personal emails).
GDPR Article 9: no special category data will be processed for investor updates; any DEI metrics are aggregated and anonymised; whistleblowing health data (if any) is segregated from IR workflows.
Cross-border data transfer: processor in Montauria (third country) engaged under EU Standard Contractual Clauses; transfer impact assessment completed 2026-03-01; hosting remains in the EEA.
CSRD/SFDR: double materiality assessment complete; PAI indicators sourced from suppliers under data minimisation; taxonomy alignment narrative based on public policies approved by the Board in 2025.
Generic form placeholders used in drafts: Name [First Last], Address [Street, No, Postcode], Phone [+00 000 000 000], Email [role@auroracarbon.eu].
Public helplines only in external materials: Shareholder Services 00800 0000 0000; OCMA public enquiries 0800 000 000; no direct mobiles or personal mailboxes.
Example identifiers in annex are non-operative: VAT/TAX OD999999999 (checksum invalid), IBAN OD12 3456 7890 1234 5678 90 (non-ISO), BIC AUR0OD00 (format placeholder).
Registered office (template): 0 Compliance Lane, 00000 Vostria, Oridonia; do not insert any home addresses.
Passport field in HR template reads “Passport No: ORD0000000” solely as a format example; do not copy into market disclosures.
Regulatory chronology: OCMA filing ref OCM-26-000000 submitted; exchange notification queued via ENGS issuer portal; these steps relate to already announced matters.
MAR closed period gatekeeping remains in force until Q2 release; Board members should avoid referencing any undisclosed price-sensitive details in minutes or slide notes.
